name: flow
description: Unified toolkit for Context-Driven Development with spec-first planning, TDD workflow, and Beads integration

useBeads.title: Use Beads for Task Persistence
useBeads.description: Use Beads (bd) for task persistence. Disable to run in degraded mode without bd.

agentsDir.title: Agents Directory
agentsDir.description: Directory where Flow stores specs, plans, and knowledge (e.g. .agents or specs)
